subtitle.en: Ingest streaming data and land it in R2
subtitle.zh: 把串流資料即時收進來，落地到 R2

tagline.en: Fire-hose of events in, neatly stored files in R2 out — no servers to babysit.
tagline.zh: 事件像消防水柱一樣灌進來，整齊的檔案落到 R2——不用顧任何伺服器。

text.en: Pipelines ingest streaming data (streaming data = a continuous flow of small events arriving non-stop, like clicks or sensor readings), optionally transform it, and write it neatly into R2 object storage for you.
text.zh: Pipelines 負責接收「串流資料（streaming data，指源源不絕、一筆筆小事件不停湧入的資料，例如點擊或感測器讀數）」，可選擇做轉換，再把它整整齊齊地寫進 R2 物件儲存。

text.en: A pipeline has three parts: a stream (where events come in, via an HTTP endpoint or a Worker), an optional SQL transformation (to filter or reshape events), and a sink (the R2 destination where files are saved, as Iceberg tables, Parquet, or JSON).
text.zh: 一條 pipeline 有三個部分：stream（事件進來的地方，透過 HTTP 端點或 Worker）、可選的 SQL 轉換（用來過濾或重塑事件），以及 sink（資料落地的 R2 目的地，可存成 Iceberg 表、Parquet 或 JSON 檔）。

text.en: A water treatment plant. A messy stream of raw events flows in (stream), gets filtered and cleaned (SQL transform), and is bottled into tidy files on a shelf (R2 sink) ready to drink later.
text.zh: 一座淨水廠。雜亂的原始事件流進來（stream），經過過濾與清洗（SQL 轉換），最後裝瓶成架上一罐罐整齊的檔案（R2 sink），等之後要用時隨時取用。

text.en: Collecting a non-stop flood of events reliably is hard: you must buffer spikes, batch them into files, and never lose or duplicate data. Pipelines does all of that as a managed service, then hands you clean files in R2.
text.zh: 可靠地收下源源不絕的大量事件其實很難：你得緩衝突發尖峰、把它們批次寫成檔案，還不能掉資料或重複資料。Pipelines 把這些全包辦成一個受管服務，最後在 R2 給你乾淨的檔案。

text.en: Events are safely buffered so traffic spikes do not drop data.
text.zh: 事件會被安全緩衝，流量暴衝時也不會掉資料。

text.en: Each event lands in R2 once — no missing rows, no duplicates.
text.zh: 每筆事件恰好落地 R2 一次——不漏、不重複。

text.en: Use SQL to filter, reshape, or enrich events before they are stored.
text.zh: 用 SQL 在資料存下前先過濾、重塑或加料。

text.en: Output lands in R2, which has zero egress fees when you read it back.
text.zh: 輸出落在 R2，之後讀回來還是零流出費。

text.en: Capture every page view and click to analyze user behavior later.
text.zh: 蒐集每一次瀏覽和點擊，之後分析使用者行為。

text.en: Stream server logs or app events into R2 for archiving and querying.
text.zh: 把伺服器日誌或應用事件串流進 R2，做封存與查詢。

text.en: Collect readings from many devices into one organized data lake.
text.zh: 把眾多裝置的讀數蒐集進同一個井然有序的資料湖。

text.en: Land structured files in R2 ready for big-data tools to query.
text.zh: 把結構化檔案落到 R2，供大數據工具直接查詢。

text.en: The guided setup command creates the stream, the SQL transform, and the R2 sink in one go. Then you send events to the HTTP endpoint and query the stored data.
text.zh: 引導式的設定指令會一次幫你建好 stream、SQL 轉換和 R2 sink。接著你把事件送到 HTTP 端點，再查詢存下來的資料。

text.en: Pipelines is available on the Workers Paid plan during open beta.
text.zh: Pipelines 在公開測試期間，於 Workers 付費方案下提供。

text.en: This walks you through naming the pipeline, enabling the HTTP endpoint, choosing an R2 bucket as the sink, and picking a transform.
text.zh: 它會帶你一步步命名 pipeline、開啟 HTTP 端點、選一個 R2 儲存桶當 sink，並挑選一個轉換方式。

text.en: POST a JSON array of events to your stream's ingest URL. Replace {stream-id} with the id from setup.
text.zh: 用 POST 把一個 JSON 事件陣列送到你 stream 的接收 URL。把 {stream-id} 換成設定時拿到的 id。

text.en: You can also push events from Worker code by POSTing to the same ingest URL.
text.zh: 你也可以在 Worker 程式碼裡用 POST 打同一個接收 URL 來推送事件。

text.en: Once events land in R2, query them with R2 SQL using your warehouse name.
text.zh: 事件落地 R2 後，用你的 warehouse 名稱搭配 R2 SQL 來查詢它們。

code.body:
export WRANGLER_R2_SQL_AUTH_TOKEN=your_api_token

npx wrangler r2 sql query "YOUR_WAREHOUSE_NAME" \
  "SELECT user_id, event, amount FROM default.ecommerce LIMIT 10"

text.en: The entry point where events arrive — via an HTTP endpoint or a Worker binding.
text.zh: 事件進來的入口——透過 HTTP 端點或 Worker 綁定。

text.en: An optional SQL step that filters, reshapes, or enriches events as they pass through.
text.zh: 一個可選的 SQL 步驟，在事件經過時做過濾、重塑或加料。

text.en: The R2 destination where data is written as Iceberg, Parquet, or JSON files.
text.zh: 資料寫入的 R2 目的地，存成 Iceberg、Parquet 或 JSON 檔案。

text.en: Many small events are grouped into larger files so storage and querying stay efficient.
text.zh: 把許多小事件聚成較大的檔案，讓儲存與查詢都更有效率。

text.en: Pipelines is in open beta on the Workers Paid plan. During beta you are not billed for Pipelines itself — you only pay standard R2 storage costs for the data it writes.
text.zh: Pipelines 目前在 Workers 付費方案下處於公開測試。測試期間 Pipelines 本身不收費——你只需支付它寫入資料時標準的 R2 儲存費用。

en: Send events as a JSON array so you can batch many records in one request.
Pick Parquet or Iceberg output if you plan to query the data with big-data tools.
Because output lives in R2, reading your data back out costs zero egress.
Need a simple message queue between Workers instead? Look at Queues.
zh: 把事件包成 JSON 陣列，就能在一個請求裡批次送出多筆紀錄。
若打算用大數據工具查詢，輸出格式選 Parquet 或 Iceberg。
因為輸出存在 R2，把資料讀回來是零流出費。
只是想在 Workers 之間放個簡單訊息佇列？可以看看 Queues。
